Indicative Term Sheet — Proposed Strategic Investment in Harborline Holdings Limited (incorporated in Hong Kong) by Blue Peak Crescent Fund LP; summary of previously announced transaction parameters only.
Target: Harborline Holdings Limited (HKEX-listed; Companies Registry ref CR No.: 3123456 — reference only, not verified); Registered office: Level 45, South Quay Tower, 88 Harbour Lane, Kowloon East, Hong Kong.
Investor: Blue Peak Crescent Fund LP (managed by a Type 9 group affiliate; CE No.: ZZZ999 — format placeholder) subscribing for up to 19.9% new shares; no change of control contemplated.
Regulatory framework: Chapter 14 of the HKEX Listing Rules (notifiable transaction), Chapter 14A not applicable; Takeovers Code whitewash waiver not required.
Disclosure status: Announcement under Part XIVA of the SFO has already been published on 2025-03-31; no inside information is contained in this term sheet.
Consideration and pricing: To be set by reference to a 30-day VWAP band; specific HKD amounts intentionally omitted; no vendor loan note.
Funding: Subscription funded from existing LP commitments; no margin financing; Escrow Account (format only): 999-000-123456-XYZ at Pearl City Bank (HK).
Conditions precedent: HKEX clearance of circular; no shareholder approval required based on current structure; confirmation of no breach of Employment Ordinance (Cap. 57) obligations.
Warranties: Standard corporate capacity and title; no undisclosed encumbrances; confirmation of prior SFC consultation not required.
Employee matters: No retrenchment planned; continuity of service and accrued entitlements to be maintained; no change to MPF scheme administrator.
Compliance: All parties acknowledge PDPO obligations; authorised signatory (role-only) may present HKID: Z123456(0) at completion for identity verification purposes.
Enquiries: investor.relations@harborline.example.hk (role mailbox); general hotline (HK): 1844 — public enquiries only, not for order placement.
Timeline: Exchange of long-form agreements within 30 days after SEHK clearance; long-stop date: 90 days thereafter; completion immediately following settlement.
Tax and filings: No stamp duty on subscription; post-completion filings to IRD ref: IRD-TS-000000 and to Companies Registry within statutory deadlines.
Form fields for execution: [Insert Company Chop], [Insert BRN], [Insert Contact Tel], [Insert Designated Email]; numbers above may be format placeholders and are not live credentials.
